scope: ATO official pages relevant to Australian FY2025-26 individual, employment, ABN/sole trader, GST/BAS, PAYG instalments, PAYG withholding, STP, TPAR, FBT, CGT, ETF/investment, crypto, rental-property records, super, private health, and company, trust, and partnership return skeleton, income, deduction, trading-stock, capital-allowance, dividend, franking-account, and Division 7A preparation.
